title: Zosterophyllanthos sphaeranthus
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos sphaeranthus is classified within the plant kingdom as a member of the family Podostemaceae. This plant belongs to the order Podostemales and the class Magnoliopsida. It is further classified as a genus within the family Podostemaceae, and is closely related to other plants in the same family. The classification of Zosterophyllanthos sphaeranthus is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics. Additionally, its classification is supported by molecular phylogenetic studies that have confirmed its relationships within the plant kingdom.
